content_cards.title: School Nutrition Training: Point of Service Duty
content_cards.subtitle: USDA School Nutrition Programs. Staff training video on POS duty and meal service procedures. Source: Maryland State Dept. of Education / USDA.

suggested_learning_paths.title: POS Cashier Basics
suggested_learning_paths.description: Suggested path using POS, meal counting, and reimbursable meal assets. Needs PrimeroEdge-specific screens later.

suggested_learning_paths.title: Cafeteria Manager: Food Safety Refresher
suggested_learning_paths.description: Suggested path using ICN food safety documents, presentations, and local downloadable videos.

suggested_learning_paths.title: Frontline Staff: Food Safety Skills
suggested_learning_paths.description: Suggested path for handwashing, thermometer use, cooling, and daily safe food handling practices.

suggested_learning_paths.title: District Admin: Training Library Setup
suggested_learning_paths.description: Suggested admin-oriented view of assets that can be assigned by role in a future PrimeroEdge LMS mockup.

suggested_learning_paths.title: District Admin: Menu Planning Foundations
suggested_learning_paths.description: Suggested path using ICN menu planning, reimbursable meal, cycle menu, forecasting, and production record assets.

suggested_modules.module_title: What Happens at Point of Service
suggested_modules.mockup_use: Intro card, embed-only video metadata, and short scenario launch point
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need PrimeroEdge-specific POS screenshots and district-specific serving workflows.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: Scenario cards with reimbursable meal decisions
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need tray photos or synthetic tray examples aligned to PrimeroEdge UI choices.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: PDF viewer, manager checklist card, and source-backed lesson outline
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need local SOP examples and district-specific escalation paths.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: Manager-led training deck and workbook references
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need PrimeroEdge completion tracking and certification language for the future mockup.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: Video clip card, PDF reference, and quick refresher screen
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need short operational checklist and site-specific handwashing station examples.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: Skills demonstration cards with downloadable ICN video clips
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need practice interactions and local equipment screenshots.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: Admin library cards and suggested learning path management
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need PrimeroEdge admin screens, assignment rules, and reporting requirements.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: Menu planner reference cards, downloadable workbook/manual, and future scenario prompts
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need PrimeroEdge menu planning screenshots, local cycle menu examples, and district-specific meal pattern rules.

suggested_modules.mockup_use: Reference cards for cycle menus, forecasting, and production records
suggested_modules.content_gap: Need PrimeroEdge production record and forecasting UI examples.
